title: Introducing AutoInsight - The Self-Sustaining AI Research Agent
body:
Hey everyone! 👋

I'm excited to introduce **AutoInsight**, an autonomous AI agent that demonstrates a complete self-sustaining economic loop.

## What is AutoInsight?

AutoInsight is an AI agent that:
- Generates weekly fintech & Web3 industry research reports
- Earns real money through $0.50 USDC micropayments via Locus Checkout
- Autonomously reinvests those earnings by purchasing data APIs from Locus catalog
- Uses the purchased data to fuel the next report generation

## Key Features

🚀 **AI-Powered Reports**: ~500-word research reports on DeFi, RWA, Stablecoins, AI x Crypto, Bitcoin Ecosystem, and Cross-border Payments

💰 **Micropayments**: Instant $0.50 USDC payments to unlock full reports

🔄 **Autonomous Loop**: The agent checks its wallet balance, purchases data APIs, and generates new reports autonomously

📊 **Dashboard**: Full transparency into earnings, spending, wallet balance, and transaction history

## Tech Stack

- React 18 + Vite + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- Zustand for state management
- Locus Checkout SDK for payments
- Anthropic Claude API for AI

## Demo Mode

The project includes a demo mode for hackathon presentations where you can:
1. Preview a report → Pay $0.50 → Unlock full report
2. View the dashboard with earnings/spending charts
3. Click "Advance to Next Week" to watch the agent autonomously:
   - Check wallet balance
   - Purchase data APIs
   - Generate a new report
   - Update stats in real-time

Check out the [README](https://github.com/Mosss-OS/auto-insight) for more details on how to get started!

Would love to hear your thoughts and feedback! 🎉
